arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany: "We could have scored 1-2 more goals"
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany felt his side could have scored "one or two more goals" against Paris Saint-Germain, but was pleased with the performance overall.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich 1-0 PSG: Player Ratings and Match Highlights
arts.sum: Kim Min-jae's first-half header was the difference as 10-man PSG fall to a fourth straight defeat against Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Newcastle, West Ham Set for Transfer Boost in Pursuit of PSG Outcast
arts.sum: As the January transfer window approaches, speculation is heating up about Randal Kolo Muani’s future at Paris Saint-Germain. His limited playing time this season has raised questions about his role under Luis Enrique. A first-half goal from Kim Min-jae saw Bayern Munich overcome 10-man Paris Saint-Germain at the Allianz Arena.

arts.ttl: PSG's Ousmane Dembele Receives Controversial Red Card vs. Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Ousmane Dembélé received two yellow cards in the span of 20 minutes in PSG's UCL clash with Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Have No Concrete Plans for £50M-Rated Liverpool, PSG Target
arts.sum: The transfer race for Eintracht Frankfurt’s Omar Marmoush is gaining momentum as the 25-year-old continues to impress in the Bundesliga this season. Despite the growing interest, one team has made it clear they won’t be overpaying for the Egyptian international. According to TBR Football, several Premier League clubs, including Arsenal, Liverpool, Manchester United, Chelsea, and […] The post Man Utd Have No Concrete Plans for £50M-Rated Liverpool, PSG Target appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Bayern boss opens up about Kimmich contract talks: "He should become captain"
arts.sum: Bayern Munich boss Max Eberl has opened up about his contract extension talks with Joshua Kimmich.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Thomas Müller “happy” with distinction of being one club football’s last one-club greats
arts.sum: On the other hand, guys like Thomas Müller are still at their first club—in his case, 24 years of being a Bayern Munich player stretching back to his academy days. It’s crazy to think that Müller has been at Bayern (since the year 2000) well before the Allianz opened (2005) or even broke ground (2002).

arts.ttl: Manchester United Set to Table €8M Wage Offer to Liverpool, PSG Target
arts.sum: Barcelona, Liverpool, and Paris Saint-Germain are all reportedly eyeing Napoli star Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. In a boost for these clubs, contract extension talks between the Georgian winger and Napoli appear to have stalled, but there’s a new suitor in this race. arts.ttl: Confirmed lineups: Bayern Munich vs. PSG
arts.sum: The lineups for Tuesday's Champions League clash between Bayern Munich and Paris Saint-Germain have been announced.
